classObjective: Identify all congruent corresponding parts of polygons and write correct congruence statements.
workedExamples: 14-2, Example 1 — Identify Congruent Corresponding Parts and Write a Congruence Statement
14-2, Example 2 — Find Unknown Values Using Congruence
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: corresponding sides and angles in congruent triangles; congruence statement vertex order; solving for variables
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice identifying congruent corresponding parts and writing congruence statements
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying corresponding parts and writing congruence statements
assessment: Exit ticket: given triangle ABC ≅ triangle DEF, identify all corresponding parts and write the 6 congruences
capReflection: Why is the order of vertices in a congruence statement important?
